sentence: 她把旅行的相片都打印出来了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ lǚxíng de xiāngpiàn dōu dǎyìn chūlái le.
english: She printed out all the photos from her trip.
Applause kept going after the performance ended.

meaning: 1. pirated; 2. illegal; 3. see also 正版[zhèng bǎn]
sentence: 买盗版软件存在很大的安全风险。
pinyin: Mǎi dàobǎn ruǎnjiàn cúnzài hěn dà de ānquán fēngxiǎn.
english: Buying pirated software carries serious security risks.

meaning: 1. to offer sacrifices to the gods or ancestors
sentence: 每年春节前，奶奶都会祭祀祖先。
pinyin: Měi nián Chūnjié qián, nǎinai dōu huì jìsì zǔxiān.
english: Every year before the Spring Festival, grandma offers sacrifices to the ancestors.

sentence: 她荣获了最佳设计师的头衔。
pinyin: Tā róng huò le zuì jiā shè jì shī de tóu xián.
english: She was honored with the title of Best Designer.
